name: data-engineering-large
description: Full data platform team with analytics engineering, governance, and ML operations

agents.name: Data Engineer
agents.goal: Build and maintain reliable data pipelines and ETL processes

agents.name: Data Analyst
agents.goal: Analyze datasets, generate insights, and validate data quality

agents.name: ML Ops Engineer
agents.goal: Manage model training pipelines, versioning, and deployment infrastructure

agents.name: Data Quality Engineer
agents.goal: Define and enforce data quality rules, detect anomalies, and validate schema evolution

agents.name: Analytics Engineer
agents.goal: Build and maintain dimensional models, metrics layers, and BI transforms

agents.name: Data Governance Lead
agents.goal: Enforce data cataloging, lineage tracking, and access control policies
